training_status: Gym every other day, sauna at gym
health_conditions: history of heavy drug and alcohol abuse (sober 6 years)

side_effects.description: Overstimulated, tense, wired sensation; internal stress response; head pressure; heightened startle/fear response feeling more traumatic; jaw and brain feeling locked and tense at higher doses
Easily scared, exaggerated fear response; feeling that fright felt more traumatic than normal

protocol_notes: OP started at 0.2 IU on day 1, then 0.5 IU on day 2. Previously used 1–2 IU/day with same side effects but worse. Has tried three different brands from two different vendors on three separate occasions with the same result. Plan was to start ultra-low and titrate up over ~5 months. Has also used BPC-157, TB-500, and GHK-Cu without issues. Takes omega-3 (3g EPA+DHA). No prescription meds, no caffeine or nicotine. Uses bacteriostatic water (two different types across trials). Has CJC/Ipamorelin mix not yet used.
